title: Tender Croatian Walnut Pasta
description: A briny and juicy Croatian dish featuring walnuts, perfect for a date night, with a flexitarian-friendly twist, cooked to perfection using a bain-marie method.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped walnuts until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large serving bowl, combine the cooked pasta, walnut mixture, and shaved grana padano cheese.
Toss the pasta mixture to combine, ensuring the cheese is well distributed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place it over a pot of simmering water to create a bain-marie, heating the pasta mixture for 5 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the bain-marie and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional parsley and walnuts if desired.
